description_long: This chair features a rounded, bucket-style seat formed from a series of closely spaced, horizontal metal rods, creating a visually light and airy structure. The seat and backrest are seamlessly integrated, curving smoothly to provide ergonomic support, while the armrests are formed by the continuous sweep of the frame. The chair is supported by four slender, angled metal legs that converge at the base, giving it a stable yet elegant stance. The open, grid-like design of the seat and backrest allows for airflow and makes the chair suitable for outdoor use, as water can easily drain through. The overall aesthetic is modern and minimalist, with a focus on geometric lines and industrial materials. The finish appears to be a matte or semi-gloss black, enhancing its contemporary appeal.
description: A modern, rounded metal chair with a grid-like seat and backrest, supported by four slender, angled legs. The design is open, airy, and minimalist, with a matte black finish.
description_view_0: Front view shows the rounded, bucket-style seat with horizontal metal rods and integrated armrests.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the continuous curve of the backrest and armrest, as well as the angled legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the full width of the backrest and the symmetrical arrangement of the legs.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, emphasizing the smooth curve and open grid structure.
